creator: Andre.Albsmeier@mchp.siemens.de
text:
Poul-Henning Kamp has been so kind and made the size of the
dmesg buffer a kernel option for -current. I have looked at
the code and made a patch for -stable. It's now working here
on 12 machines for about 3 weeks whitout problems. It would be
nice if someone committed this to -stable.

I have attached the patch below, if some other things are needed,
tell me.
